query: Classify open PRs that haven't moved in 14+ days into per-bucket actions.
expected_behavior: Fetches open PRs with lightweight bulk query (number, title, author, updatedAt, isDraft, labels).
Filters to >=14 days since updatedAt; per-finalist fetches heavy fields (mergeStateStatus, reviewDecision, statusCheckRollup, last commit timestamp) — split from bulk to avoid GraphQL 502s.
Applies classification rules in first-match-wins order: READY_TO_MERGE -> NEEDS_REBASE -> WAITING_CI -> WAITING_REVIEW -> ABANDONED -> UNCLEAR.
Output grouped by bucket with per-row recommended action; never auto-merges, never auto-closes.
